summary: Full backend + frontend test of Startup Master - Global Expansion. All 6 backend pytest tests pass (health, root, IT/EN viral_trend event generation via Claude Sonnet 4.5, market_crash, unknown event_type fallback). Full frontend tutorial flow verified end-to-end on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: HUD with all 7 stats, tutorial overlay, buy-desk, hire-junior, launch-hello, all 5 tabs, real-estate (garage current), milestones (first_desk unlocked), language toggle (Office<->Ufficio), reset button. No console or page errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: PROMPT_TEMPLATES.get(req.event_type, PROMPT_TEMPLATES['viral_trend']) silently falls back to viral_trend prompt for unknown event_types but echoes the original event_type back. Consider returning 400 for unknown types or documenting the fallback.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('shutdown') — consider migrating to lifespan handlers (FastAPI >=0.110).
Backend uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] / os.environ['DB_NAME'] (KeyError if missing) which is correct fail-fast behavior; good.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is read with default '' and only checked at request time; that's fine but logging when empty at startup would help debugging.
test_credentials: Not required - no auth in app
seed_data_creation: None - localStorage cleared before frontend test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py cover health + 4 event-generation scenarios using real Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key. Each event call takes ~2s. Frontend test confirmed cash deltas: buy-desk costs 120 (998->876 incl. ~1s burn) and hire-junior costs 200 (876->671 incl. burn). iso-desk-0 and iso-active-project appear after corresponding actions. office-garage-current and milestone-first_desk testids exist and behave correctly. Lang toggle switches Office<->Ufficio.
rca of the issue: No issues found. App is functioning as specified.
